## grid_view_content

Renders media files as cards in a responsive grid layout.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

href="https://github.com/cj-mills/cjm-fasthtml-workflow-transcription-single-file/blob/main/cjm_fasthtml_workflow_transcription_single_file/media/components.py#L78"

>                         ingle_file.media.models.MediaFile], mounter:cjm_fastht
>                         ml_workflow_transcription_single_file.media.mounter.Me
>                         diaMounter, start_idx:int=0,
>                         media_type:Optional[str]=None,
>                         preview_route_func=None, modal_id:str='sf-media-
>                         preview')

*Render media files as cards in a responsive grid layout.*
